543 ANTCGLNT_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD ANTCGLNT_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD High-Risk Drug (Indication): Anticoagulant (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was taking medication from the anticoagulant class and whether there was an indication noted for all medications in the drug class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not
